prompt_rendered: List the names of all running Docker containers on this host.
response_content:

I'll check the running Docker containers on Spark1 (the host where services run).The command returned successfully with 14 container names, so I should present them clearly to the user as a simple list.

6. **redis-cache** - Redis cache instance
7. **functionary-router** - Functionary router service
8. **memgraph-lab** - Memgraph Lab UI

10. **searxng** - SearXNG search engine
11. **searxng-valkey** - Valkey cache for SearXNG

13. **redis-memory** - Redis memory store
14. **qdrant** - Qdrant vector database
15. **portainer_agent** - Portainer agent for container management

All 15 containers are currently running on Spark1 (192.168.4.205).
